'''ngal챦fv챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psaltery|psaltery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psaltery|psaltery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngal챦fv챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fth|ngal챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fj|ngal챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fsh|ngal챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f|ngal챦fv챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:ngal챦fl챦fv챦fth|ngal챦fl챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ngal챦fl챦fv챦fj|ngal챦fl챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ngal챦fl챦fv챦fsh|ngal챦fl챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ngal챦fl챦fv챦f|ngal챦fl챦fv챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fth|ngal챦fv챦fth]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fj|ngal챦fv챦fj]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦fsh|ngal챦fv챦fsh]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f|ngal챦fv챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fl|ngal챦fv챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fl|ngal챦fv챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fl|ngal챦fv챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fl|ngal챦fv챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f|ngal챦fv챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fn|ngal챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fn|ngal챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fn|ngal챦fv챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦fn|ngal챦fv챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦foro|ngal챦fv챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦foro|ngal챦fv챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦foro|ngal챦fv챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngal챦fv챦f챦foro|ngal챦fv챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|e8d4f4a}}
